---
title: "Jonathan Pearce"
subtitle: "Data analyst · Machine learning · Statistics"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/profile-placeholder.png
  image-shape: rounded
  image-width: 20em
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/Jonathan-Pearce
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jonathan-pearce
toc: false
---

I work in the areas of data analytics, machine learning, and statistics.
This site is a place to share projects, blog posts, datasets, and resources.
